/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/image_converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/audio_converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/video_converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/document_converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/data_converter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ufc.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o ufc
